recommendations.title: Ride or Die
recommendations.overview: Rei helps the woman she's been in love with for years escape her abusive husband. While on the run, their feelings for each other catch fire.

recommendations.title: The Neighbors' Window
recommendations.overview: The story of a middle-aged woman with small children whose life is shaken up when two free-spirited twenty-somethings move in across the street.

recommendations.title: Passing
recommendations.overview: In 1920s New York City, a Black woman finds her world upended when her life becomes intertwined with a former childhood friend who's passing as white.

recommendations.title: The Mitchells vs. the Machines
recommendations.overview: A quirky, dysfunctional family's road trip is upended when they find themselves in the middle of the robot apocalypse and suddenly become humanity's unlikeliest last hope.

recommendations.title: It Ends with Us
recommendations.overview: When a woman's first love suddenly reenters her life, her relationship with a charming, but abusive neurosurgeon is upended, and she realizes she must learn to rely on her own strength to make an impossible choice for her future.

recommendations.title: Love Everlasting
recommendations.overview: Bridger is a young outsider who's always wanted more. He and his mother flee an abusive home, eventually finding a small town in the middle of nowhere. Once there, Bridger finds true acceptance with another misfit.

recommendations.title: Bad Day for the Cut
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged Irish farmer, who still lives at home with his mother, sets off on a mission of revenge when the old lady is murdered.

recommendations.title: Le Notti Bianche
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged man meets a young woman who is waiting on a canal bridge for her lover's return.

recommendations.title: Ikiru
recommendations.overview: Kanji Watanabe is a middle-aged man who has worked in the same monotonous bureaucratic position for decades. Learning he has cancer, he starts to look for the meaning of his life.

recommendations.title: Who's Afraid of Virginia Woolf?
recommendations.overview: A history professor and his wife entertain a young couple who are new to the university's faculty. As the drinks flow, secrets come to light, and the middle-aged couple unload onto their guests the full force of the bitterness, dysfunction, and animo
